name: cad2gis-project
description: Project-local Codex guidance and MCP context for the Cad2GIS Python/QGIS pipeline.

interface.shortDescription: Work on the Cad2GIS CAD-to-GIS pipeline with project-specific guidance.
interface.longDescription: Adds project-local guidance and read-only MCP context for the Cad2GIS Python/QGIS conversion platform, including commands, architecture, tests, and deterministic runtime constraints.
defaultPrompt: Run the right Cad2GIS verification checks.
Help extend Cad2GIS without runtime LLMs.
